author: danielknopik
content:
hey Aarsh! awesome!

I propose we just use glamsterdam-devnet-7 for testing this. I am currently integrating LH's glamsterdam-devnet-7 branch with partial columns

Do we want to use progressive containers for the partial message structures? I think we should.

author: danielknopik
content: not sure if there is a call today, but unfortunately i can not attend

author: aarshshahoffchain
content: <@1000001410538151996> Yeah, we can use "glamsterdam-devnet-7".  Btw, what do you mean by "Do we want to use progressive containers for the partial message structures" ?

author: danielknopik
content:
I am referring to the use of `ProgressiveList` instead of `List` here: https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/17016b664f92398c828f011900e8de050836cb55/specs/gloas/partial-columns/p2p-interface.md?plain=1#L50-L51

I was unaware this was actually already changed in the spec - I still need to adapt this in LH, should be no problem though
